## Summary

What does this PR do, and why?

## Related backlog/issue

Link the issue, backlog task, or Linear ticket this addresses (if any).

## Verification

- [ ] `pytest -q` is green
- [ ] `ruff check src tests` is green
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed

## Safety

- [ ] No secrets in code, tests, or fixtures, and no assumptions that Kalph
      can push or merge directly to `main`/`master`
